programme.title: Capítulo 56
programme.desc: Miguel's mother gets upset when she learns about him attending Elite Way School. In fear of The Lodge, Vico breaks up with Miguel. Franco and Miguel's mother meet each other.

programme.title: Capítulo 57
programme.desc: Franco invites Miguel and his family to celebrate Christmas at his house. Miguel's mother is confused at why Miguel is going back to high school.

programme.title: Capítulo 58
programme.desc: Mia confronts her father asking for the reason he never talks about her mother. Miguel and his mother argue; he reveals his plan to avenge his father's death against Franco.

programme.title: Capítulo 59
programme.desc: Franco sends Alma a message saying he won't be intimidated. Esteban destroys José Lujan's homework. Only the boys are allowed to be in the dance contest.

programme.title: Capítulo 60
programme.desc: Nico's dad is sick and in the hospital. The guys from the band decide to give Nico the money from their first singing gig to help. Miguel also asks Franco for a loan to help Nico and his family.

programme.title: Capítulo 61
programme.desc: Pascual wants Roberta to apologize to Hilda but Alma comes to put the teacher straight before it can happen. Roberta invites Teo and José Lujan to her house for Christmas.

programme.title: Capítulo 62
programme.desc: Mia doesn't want Miguel to have the check her father has given her to give to him. Roberta gets mad at Mia for thinking Miguel lied about Nico's dad.

programme.title: Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Roberta gets revenge on Mia by making Mia think he father died. Joaquín offers Tomás work running drugs. Mia and Roberta have a legitimate boxing match.

programme.title: Capítulo 64
programme.desc: Everyone thinks Mia and Roberta fought over Joaquín. Tomás doesn't want to run drugs but is threatened by Joaquín. Nico plans to quit school to take care of his family.

programme.title: El embarazo de Federica
programme.desc: Ludoviquito le da a su madre un licuado verde (que es en realidad un limpia cañerías), causándole ascos, lo que hace pensar a todos que Federica esta nuevamente embarazada. Y todos sueñan como sería el bebé.

programme.title: Bibi es normal
programme.desc: Federica asusta a Bibi con un sartén para hacerle un test de oído; sin embargo se desmaya y de repente ven que se "vuelve normal" (en realidad se vuelve rebelde y excéntrica, lo que para la familia es normal). Ludovico, cansado del comportamiento de su hija, y tanto Junior como Ludoviquito de que no le preste atención, deciden hacer que tenga otro accidente para que vuelva a ser la de antes. No obstante, Federica la protege mucho de Ludovico ya que le gusta que Bibi sea (lo que ella considera) normal.

programme.title: Arturo sastre
programme.desc: Arturo takes out his old sewing machine to dedicate himself to sewing. Vanesa brings a rooster with Alzheimer's into the building that crows all day.

programme.title: El trabajo de Alejandra
programme.desc: The López Pérez need an extra income of money and Alejandra goes out to look for a job. Benito meets a friend from the castings and invites him to the apartment.

programme.title: La gotera
programme.desc: A leak in the López Pérez bathroom causes leaks in Pedro's apartment. Benito and Liz go to a casting for the musical Grease.

programme.title: Mi amiga Virginia
programme.desc: Virginia is left homeless and jobless. Germán decides to give her asylum and she becomes everyone's best friend. Luis signs up for Zumba classes online.

programme.title: Fiesta de casados
programme.desc: Luis feels lonely and Silvia encourages him to organize a meeting in the apartment. Luis invites the married men in the building. Vanesa entrusts Germán with a little bird with behavior problems.

programme.title: San Antonio
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis accidentally break Silvia's San Antonio statue. The López Pérez family complain about the high water consumption in the building.

programme.title: No se peleen
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis fight over Borre's last taco and they stop talking. Vanesa leaves Benito in charge of a cat.

programme.title: El álbum
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis find a photo album in the garbage and through it they remember the best of the worst of the neighbors.

programme.title: Germán por un día
programme.desc: Germán gets sick and the neighbors decide to help him with the building work. Magdalena invents a trip to Paris to show off to her friend.

programme.title: Embarazo
programme.desc: Germán has the task of planting small trees that the mayor's office has given them. Someone in the building is pregnant.

programme.title: ¡Voy a ser papá!
programme.desc: Silvia le confiesa a Luis que está embarazada y él comienza a comprar muchas cosas para el bebé. Magdalena y su familia se vuelven ricos y comienzan a derrochar su dinero.

programme.title: La casa de las Lomas
programme.desc: Magdalena les dice a los vecinos que ella y su familia se mudarán a Las Lomas y le pide a Luis comprarle una mansión.

programme.title: Perdimos todo
programme.desc: Luis comienza a molestar a Silvia todo el tiempo queriendo controlar lo que hace para cuidar del bebé. Magdalena invierte todo su dinero en una empresa fantasma y pierde todo.

programme.title: Luisito, corazón de plomo
programme.desc: Magda le dice a Luis que no pueden mudarse a su mansión y le pide de vuelta las llaves del departamento, pero él se niega a dejarlos vivir en en edificio otra vez y todos los vecinos tratan de convencerlo de darles otra oportunidad.

programme.title: El muñeco vudú
programme.desc: Germán y Jorjáis encuentran un muñeco vudú, asumen que alguien está haciendo brujería en el edificio. Pedro, Cris y Vanesa tienen problemas con el WiFi de su departamento.

programme.title: Síntomas empáticos
programme.desc: Luis descubre que es él (y no Silvia), quien tiene los síntomas del embarazo. Los vecinos encuentran en la calle carteles pegados de: "Se busca a Jorjáis".

programme.title: La hija de Jorjais
programme.desc: Una mujer le pregunta a Germán sobre el paradero de Jorjáis, y él se sorprende al descubrir que ella es su hija. Vanessa cree que tiene la maldición de la soltería.

programme.title: Niño o niña
programme.desc: Luis ya no sabe que hacer con Silvia porque tiene muchos cambios de humor por el embarazo, pero sus vecinos lo convencen de darle una sorpresa que jamás olvidará.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: MeatEater - Forty mile Caribou: Part 2
programme.desc: Continuing their adventure in Alaska's interior, Steve, Doug, and Mark push deeper into the caribou migration. With Doug still hoping to take his first bull, the team sets up on a high ridge, watching caribou stream across the landscape. They face grizzly bears, dense fog, and the ever-changing weather of the Alaskan wilderness. As the days pass, they work together to intercept a herd of caribou, knowing their window could close.

programme.title: MeatEater - Wild Game Master Class
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella steps out of the field and into the kitchen to showcase some of his favorite.

programme.title: MeatEater - Idaho Mountain Lion
programme.desc: Steve heads to the panhandle of Idaho to join wildlife biologist and dedicated houndsman Bart George for a mountain lion hunt. programme.title: MeatEater - Southeast Alaska Blacktail Deer

programme.title: MeatEater - Nebraska Whitetails

programme.title: MeatEater - Louisiana Ducks
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins Jean-Paul Bourgeois and Ronnie Collins in Louisiana‚ Mississippi Delta for a duck hunt. Surrounded by the unique landscape of the Delta, they target multiple duck species. After a successful hunt, the team returns to camp, where Jean-Paul prepares a traditional Cajun meal featuring the day‚ catch. Experience the cultural tradition of turning fresh game into flavorful, local dishes like duck gumbo and crawfish boil.

programme.title: MeatEater - Hawaii Hogs and Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella, Ryan Callahan, and Danny Bolton travel to Hawaii's Big Island for a unique hunt. They stalk feral sheep in the lush mountainsides and target wild hogs on a coffee plantation, using the animals' movements through macadamia groves to their advantage. The episode highlights Hawaii's blend of hunting and conservation, ending with a Hawaiian-style feast featuring the fresh game they harvested.

programme.desc: Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) becomes convinced that Lydia (Holland Roden) is the shapeshifter they're after since she seemed immune to its toxin, forcing Scott (Tyler Posey) to gather his friends -- and even some enemies -- to protect her.

programme.title: Frenemy
programme.desc: With startling new information about the shapeshifter, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) hurry to protect their friends while Allison (Crystal Reed) is given an investigative task by her family. And there is "panic at the disco."

programme.title: Restraint
programme.desc: Lydia (Holland Roden) makes connections about the bite from Peter (Ian Bohen). Jackson (Colton Haynes) causes problems for Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) has a crisis of faith in his leadership abilities.

programme.title: Raving
programme.desc: During a secret concert, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) come up with a method to trap the new shapeshifter. At the same time, Allison's mother (Eaddy Mays) comes up with a plan of her own to take care of Scott once and for all.

programme.title: Party Guessed
programme.desc: Even as his relationship with Allison (Crystal Reed) is further strained, Scott (Tyler Posey) must attend Lydia's (Holland Roden) birthday party while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) locks up his new wolves on their first full moon together.

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: With a secret revealed, Scott (Tyler Posey), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien), Melissa and Stilinski are taken hostage in the Sheriff's station. Allison (Crystal Reed) then tracks Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) to the station, bringing Argent and Gerard with her.

programme.title: Battlefield
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) must help win the championship lacrosse game while also trying to figure out how to stop Gerard (Michael Hogan). At the same time, Alison (Crystal Reed) and Argent (JR Bourne) continue their hunt of Derek (Tyler Hoechlin).

programme.title: Master Plan
programme.desc: In the second season finale, although everyone is still reeling from a shocking death on the lacrosse field, Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends rush to figure out Gerard's (Michael Hogan) master plan…but Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) has his own plan.

programme.title: Tattoo
programme.desc: In the exciting Season 3 premiere, a new Alpha Pack arrives to wreak havoc on Scott's (Tyler Posey) life, while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) and Isaac (Daniel Sharman) struggle to locate Erica (Gage Golightly) and Boyd (Sinqua Walls).

programme.title: Chaos Rising
programme.desc: Allison and Lydia stumble on a clue to finding Boyd and Erica, while a childhood friend of Stiles goes missing. Meanwhile, Derek is surprised by the reappearance of someone from his past…someone he thought had died in the Hale house fire.

programme.title: Decompression
programme.desc: After the plane he is traveling in is struck by lightning, a Presidential candidate is visited by a time traveler who tells him that he needs to escape impending death because his presidency is the key to preventing an apocalyptic future.

programme.title: Abaddon
programme.desc: The crew of a space salvage ship is awakened from hyper-sleep when they come across a mysterious object floating through space. They soon discover the pod contains a tyrant, in stasis, who was banished from Earth for crimes against humanity.

programme.title: The Grid
programme.desc: A man travels back to his home town in order to investigate his brother's murder, allegedly at the hands of his brother's wife. He quickly discovers his hometown has drastically changed...and the residents seem to be under some form of mind control.

programme.title: Revival
programme.desc: A preacher (Gary Busey), who lost his faith when his wife died, performs staged healing miracles at tent revivals until he finds his faith -- and livelihood -- being tested as never before by the appearance of a mysterious wheelchair-bound man.

programme.title: Gettysburg
programme.desc: Two friends re-enacting the Battle of Gettysburg unwittingly find themselves transported back in time and taken prisoner by a deranged Confederate colonel (Meatloaf) who might not only endanger their future…but the future of the country as well.

programme.title: Something About Harry
